creator: bkoenig@alpha-tierchen.de
text:
Chess Griffin wrote:

> [...] this port seems to install just the
> serif fonts.  I've used Libertine on Linux systems and there is a sans
> serif as well (and a monospace, IIRC).  The website displays the sans
> serif fonts.  It would be nice to have the rest of the fonts too.

The port installs all ttf and otf files that are packaged in
LinLibertineFont-2.7.tgz. I haven't found sans serif or monospace fonts.
The "styles" section of the website [1] lists serif fonts only (except a
grotesque).

Regards
Björn

[1] http://linuxlibertine.sourceforge.net/Libertine-EN.html
